description.en: Add fallback as the fallback object for the current translation object. A translation object should consult the fallback if it cannot provide a translation for a given message.

excerpt.es: Add fallback as the fallback object for the current translation object. A translation object should consult the fallback if it cannot provide a translation for a given message.
